cards.afterText: Recover 1 health. If Baba Yaga is inside The Hut, recover 2 health instead.
cards.title: Iron Teeth

cards.afterText: Your opponent discards 1 card. If Baba Yaga is inside The Hut, they discard a random card instead.
cards.title: Boney Leg

cards.duringText: If Baba Yaga is inside The Hut, this card's value is 6 instead.
cards.title: The Devil's Grandmother

cards.afterText: Deal 1 damage to the opposing fighter. If Baba Yaga is inside The Hut, deal 2 damage instead.
cards.title: Behave!

cards.afterText: Move the opposing fighter up to 3 spaces. They can move through opposing fighters. Draw 1 card.
cards.title: Turn your back to the forest

cards.afterText: Move Baba Yaga up to 3 spaces. She can move through opposing fighters. Draw 1 card.
cards.title: Pestle and Mortar

cards.immediateText: You may discard this card to play a different defense card from your hand.
cards.title: Enhanced Awareness

cards.afterText: You may place Baba Yaga in any space.
cards.title: Bewilderment

cards.basicText: Move 2 opposing fighters up to 3 spaces each. If they end their movement inside The Hut, their players discard 1 card.
cards.title: Magical Compulsion

cards.afterText: Place the opposing fighter in any space inside The Hut and place Baba Yaga in an adjacent space. If you won the combat, gain 1 action.
cards.title: Abduction

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Skirmish

cards.afterText: Move The Hut up to 4 spaces. It may move through opposing fighters. Then, deal 1 damage to each opposing fighter it moved through.
cards.title: Chicken Legs

cards.basicText: Deal 2 damage to each opposing fighter inside The Hut, and 1 damage to each opposing fighter adjacent to The Hut.
cards.title: Spinning Rampage

hero.name: Baba Yaga
hero.quote: The witch of the deep woods and her chicken-legged Hut — lure victims through its door into a little board all her own, where every card she casts cuts deeper.
hero.specialAbility: Fighters can move between The Hut's space and the Entry spaces in The Hut board as if they were adjacent. At the end of your turn, deal 1 damage to every opposing fighter inside The Hut, and place them in spaces in The Hut's zone.

ruleCards.content:
The Hut board is made up of 4 spaces sharing a zone, two of which are Entry spaces. The Hut board is a part of the map.

Opposing fighters can move through The Hut sidekick. The Hut sidekick can never occupy a space on the Hut board.

 When The Hut is defeated, place all fighters inside The Hut board in spaces in The Hut's zone and remove it from play.
ruleCards.title: The Hut

sidekick.name: The Hut
sidekick.quote: A hut on hen's legs that walks where it pleases — its door opens for everyone and asks no one.

name: Baba Yaga
note:
Baba Yaga's Hut is both a sidekick and the access point to a small, separate board that Baba Yaga lures opposing fighters into to enhance her abilities. Being mobile, The Hut can roam around and help Baba Yaga abduct her victims. I appreciate any feedback! You may use this for The Hut mini-board: https://unbrewed.xyz/evergreen-decks/art/yAJ-/hut-miniboard.webp.

DOWNLOAD: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1NisjfcFe4WTQageEgqeiRqiyj9qXX5Uc/view?usp=sharing

V0.6
- Increased Baba Yaga's health to 12
- Ability Update - At the end of your turn, deal 1 damage to every opposing fighter inside The Hut, and place them in spaces in The Hut's zone.

V0.7
- Increased Iron Teeth's value to 4
- Increased Abduction's value to 5

V0.75
- Added a second entry in The Hut board

V0.8
- When The Hut dies, it is now removed from the board
- Turn Your Back to the Forest is now an Any card
- Boney Leg now reads "After Combat: Your opponent discards 1 card. If Baba Yaga is inside The Hut, they discard a random card instead."
- Behave! no longer requires winning the combat to activate.
- Abduction's value reduced to 4
- Iron Teeth's value reduced to 3
- Pestle and Mortar now also draws a card
- Abduction now places Baba Yaga adjacent to the abducted fighter.
- Removed 1 Abduction, added 1 Skirmish
- Increased Behave!'s value to 3
- Turn Your Back now draws 1 card.
- Abduction now no longer requires winning, and gains 1 action upon winning.
- Chicken Legs now moves The Hut up to 4 spaces instead of 3.
